identity.name: Renergizr Industries Private Limited
identity.theme_preference: Light Mode with Deep Contrast Sections

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Outfit:wght@400;500;700;900&display=swap');

primary.name: Deep Forest
primary.usage: Strong backgrounds, primary text, heavy emphasis

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-base font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-base font-medium border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-emerald-100 bg-white/50 p-8 hover:border-emerald-300 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-sm
cards.service: rounded-2xl border-none bg-slate-50 p-10 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 group

inputs.style: h-14 rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 text-slate-900 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on dark sections: bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-20

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Theme: Apply the light theme variables in 'index.css' but ensure 'App.css' does not override layout.
3. Hero: Use the Solar Farm image as a full-width background with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/40) to ensure white text pops.
4. Navigation: Floating glass navbar. Sticky on scroll.
5. Forms: Contact form must be functional in layout (no backend) but visually perfect.
6. Motion: Use framer-motion for staggering entrance of service cards.
7. Footer: Massive footer with dark background (Deep Forest color) and large typography.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use #022c22 (Deep Forest) as the darkest shade.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' or 'Manrope'.
Avoid gradients on text unless it's a very subtle shine effect.
